_comment: MCP config for calendar-plan skill ONLY. Loaded via `claude --mcp-config <this-file> --strict-mcp-config` from calendar-plan.sh. Local stdio MCPs via npx. Tokens in env blocks. No claude.ai integrations, no remote HTTP. See docs/SETUP-MCPS.md for per-server credential walkthroughs.
_setup: Copy to config/mcp-config.json, fill in real values. The real file is chmod 600 and gitignored.

filesystem-vault._scope: Scoped to entire Obsidian vault root for read AND write. Used to read Calendar Context page, and append to it if the planner ever needs to (default: read-only behavior enforced by the prompt). Narrow this path if you want stricter scope.
